text.heading: Advertise With Us
Sponsored Content
text.p: This is a special page published on the Vanguard website with a text link on the homepage or entire site. Sponsored content can be special press releases, product announcements, events announcements, public notices etc.
text.heading: Featured Sponsored Content
text.p: This is a special page published on the Vanguard website with a 300X250px banner on the homepage or entire site. Featured sponsored content can contain picture galleries and videos streamed via YouTube. Specially designed for Hotels, Tourist centers, and companies who wish to do a special feature on their products and services. Governments might also be interest in this, to feature their current projects.
text.heading: Technical Details
text.p: Banner Size 120 X 600 pixels: Appears on the left inset of the home page and all pages on the site. Your banner will be posted on the Vanguard site and rotated with other banners currently on display.

Banner Size 300 X 250 pixels: Appears on the right side of the home page and all pages on the site. Your banner will be posted on the Vanguard site and rotated with other banners currently on display.

Banner Size 468 X 60 pixels: Appears on the top right conner of the homepage and all pages on the site.Your banner will be posted on the Vanguard site and rotated with other banners currently on display ).

Banner Size 125 X 125 pixels: Appears on the left inset of the home page and all pages on the site. Your banner will be posted on the Vanguard site and rotated with other banners currently on display.
Text Link (maximum 50 words)(Appears on right side of every article on the site).
text.heading: Submission of Materials
text.p: Banner ads can be in swf,jpeg and gif format.All materials must be deliverd via electronic. All ads must be delivered via electronic version, either on disk or e-mail in the ordered pixel dimensions unless otherwise noted.
text.heading: For Web Advert Details,
